attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
B.OBJECT_ID
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,B.SUBSCR_CREATE_DT
,B.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,B.PREPAID_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,B.RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT
,B.SNAPSHOT_DATE
,B.TERM_START_DT
,B.TERM_END_DT
,B.LINKED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,B.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID
,B.PREVIOUS_CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID
,B.SBSCRPTN_END_REASON_TXT
,B.DRAWDOWN_LOCAL_AMT
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_RENEW_CNT
,B.INTENDED_USE
,B.SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_DATE
,B.OFFER_TYPE
,B.BUNDLE_FLAG
,B.END_COMPLETE_DATE
,B.INTERNAL_ORDER_LINE_NO
,B.INTERNAL_ORDER_NO
,B.ORDER_TYPE
,B.LINE_FLAG
,B.CURRENT_TERM
,B.WEB_ORDER_ID
,B.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
,B.PLAN_CODE
,B.SUBSCR_OFFER_ID
,B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
,B.REFRESH_DATETIME
,B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE
,B.FULLY_QUALIFIED_TABLE_NAME 
,B.TRAIL_POSITION 
,B.TOKEN
 ,B.REFRESH_DAY	
 ,B.MAPPED_ATO
,B.CANCEL_TYPE
,B.CONSUMPTION_MODEL
,B.SUBSCR_GROUP_ID
,B.SUBSCR_DNT_CODE
,B.STRATEGIC_CLASS
,B.STRATEGIC_INTENT

FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CISCO_SUBSCR_DETAILS  B,
(
SELECT OBJECT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CISCO_SUBSCR_DETAILS 
MINUS
SELECT OBJECT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CISCO_SUBSCR_DETAILS
) A
WHERE 
 A.OBJECT_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND A.REFRESH_DATETIME=B.REFRESH_DATETIME
